style_guide: Painted kid-friendly spy adventure, city-country finale, readable embedded props, no text inside generated images.

assets.prompt: A kid-friendly spy adventure City-Country Finale background with a country cottage, city apartment, central planning table, mission message board, city postcard, country postcard, routine card, compare-view sign, and final academy gate embedded naturally in the painted scene; no readable text, no floating props, no oversized cards.

assets.decision: Reuse Agent Alex's established spritesheet for campaign continuity.
Reuse Agent Alex's established portrait sheet.
Reuse the polished guide spritesheet for Agent Nora until a dedicated finale guide sheet is needed.

integration_note: Level 11 uses one embedded-prop background. Inventory icons are cropped from the background by the runtime; there are no world overlay icons.
